General.Name: Medialink Group Ltd
General.Description: Medialink Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the distribution of third-party owned media content in Hong Kong, rest of Asia, the Americas, and the Europe. The company operates in two segments, Media Content Distribution and Brand Licensing. It distributes media content acquired from media content licensors, including content relating to animation series, variety shows, drama series, animated and live-action feature films, and other video content; provision of licensing agency services; theatrical release; retail trading; and events and exhibitions. The company is also involved in licensing and sub-licensing various rights in relation to brands owned by brand licensors comprising merchandising rights; location-based entertainment rights for events; promotion rights; and provision of sales, marketing, and administrative support services, as well as invests in media content production. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tower 2, The Gateway, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
